2604.09058.title: PDE-regularized Dynamics-informed Diffusion with Uncertainty-aware Filtering for Long-Horizon Dynamics
2604.09058.paper_summary: Long-horizon spatiotemporal prediction remains a challenging problem due to cumulative errors, noise amplification, and the lack of physical consistency in existing models. While diffusion models provide a probabilistic framework for modeling uncertainty, conventional approaches often rely on mean squared error objectives and fail to capture the underlying dynamics governed by physical laws. In this work, we propose PDYffusion, a dynamics-informed diffusion framework that integrates PDE-based regularization and uncertainty-aware forecasting for stable long-term prediction. The proposed method consists of two key components: a PDE-regularized interpolator and a UKF-based forecaster. The interpolator incorporates a differential operator to enforce physically consistent intermediate states, while the forecaster leverages the Unscented Kalman Filter to explicitly model uncertainty and mitigate error accumulation during iterative prediction. We provide theoretical analyses showing that the proposed interpolator satisfies PDE-constrained smoothness properties, and that the forecaster converges under the proposed loss formulation. Extensive experiments on multiple dynamical datasets demonstrate that PDYffusion achieves superior performance in terms of CRPS and MSE, while maintaining stable uncertainty behavior measured by SSR. We further analyze the inherent trade-off between prediction accuracy and uncertainty, showing that our method provides a balanced and robust solution for long-horizon forecasting.
2604.09058.paper_summary_zh: 長期時空預測仍然是一個具有挑戰性的問題，因為累積誤差、噪聲放大以及現有模型缺乏物理一致性。雖然擴散模型提供了一個建模不確定性的概率框架，但傳統方法通常依賴均方誤差目標，未能捕捉由物理法則主導的潛在動態。在這項工作中，我們提出了PDYffusion，一個動態知識驅動的擴散框架，整合了基於偏微分方程的正則化和不確定性感知預測，以實現穩定的長期預測。所提出的方法由兩個關鍵組件組成：一個PDE正則化插值器和一個基於UKF的預測器。插值器結合了一個微分運算符，以強制執行物理一致的中間狀態，而預測器則利用無跡卡爾曼濾波器明確建模不確定性，並在迭代預測過程中減少誤差累積。我們提供了理論分析，顯示所提出的插值器滿足PDE約束的光滑性質，並且預測器在所提出的損失公式下收斂。在多個動態數據集上的廣泛實驗表明，PDYffusion在CRPS和MSE方面達到了卓越的性能，同時保持了通過SSR測量的穩定不確定性行為。我們進一步分析了預測準確性與不確定性之間的固有權衡，顯示我們的方法為長期預測提供了一個平衡且穩健的解決方案。
2604.09058.author: Min Young Baeg et.al.
